---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve Assemble
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Bug
Provide a clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to page
2. Click on component
3. See error or unexpected behavior

## Expected Behavior
Provide a description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
Provide a description of what actually happened.

## Environment Details
- OS: [for example, macOS, Windows, Linux]
- Browser: [for example, Chrome, Firefox, Safari]
- Node version: [for example, 20.x]

## Additional Context
Add any other context, screenshots, or logs about the problem here.
